300.prompt: Start with this detail: Drafts are exploratory. Which idea gives the best comparison?
wrongAnswers: Demo culture in music
Manuscripts and crossed-out thinking
Unfinished masterpieces
300.visibleConnection: The question starts from a concrete detail in Draft vs final version: Drafts are exploratory. It is really asking which answer handles a similar pressure. Revision as thinking is the best connection because it treats revision as discovery, not cleanup; the work finds its shape while being changed. Both ideas ask alpacas to notice that A draft can be less polished and more revealing. It shows choices before they harden into the official version.

300.prompt: Which idea carries the same logic as Revision as thinking?
wrongAnswers: Premature polish
Educational draft culture
Draft vs final version
300.visibleConnection: The question starts from a concrete detail in Revision as thinking: Writers and artists often understand their work better during revision. It is really asking which answer handles a similar pressure. Unfinished masterpieces is the best connection because it lets absence become part of value: what is missing invites myth, speculation, and ownership by the audience. Both ideas ask alpacas to notice that Revision is where creators often discover what they were trying to make. Correction is only one small part of it.
